reasoning: The question requires Praggnanandhaa's Elo rating on Wikipedia to be at least 1% higher than his rating on May 25, 2025. His May rating was 2758, meaning he needs to reach at least 2786 (an increase of ~28 points). He won the Superbet Chess Classic in mid-May, gaining exactly 9 points, which will bring his June 1 rating to 2767. To reach 2786, he would need an additional 19 Elo points. For the June 1 and June 24 resolution dates, this is virtually impossible as his June rating is locked at 2767 and FIDE publishes classical ratings only once a month. For the August 23 target, his rating would rely on the August 1 list; since he is mostly missing Norway Chess and focusing on rapid/blitz in early summer, his chances of gaining 19 standard rating points in July are exceptionally low. For the November 21 target, he may play in the Sinquefield Cup (August) and could see some fluctuation, but gaining 19 points against top 10 competition natively entails scoring near-historic margins in super-tournaments (which top-5 players seldom achieve within a few months). Hence, while slightly higher for the distant horizon, the probability remains very low across the board.
